ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "shipping_time" TEXT /* Typical shipping time for the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently available in inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity threshold for reordering */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the threshold is reached */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period offered by the supplier */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for supplier contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for supplier contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Supplier's street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Supplier's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Supplier's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Supplier's zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Supplier's country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the product subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the product characteristic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product characteristic */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_characteristics_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES product_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_characteristic_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic value */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product */,
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the characteristic */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_characteristic_values_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_characteristic_values_characteristic_id FOREIGN KEY ("characteristic_id") REFERENCES product_characteristics ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the shipping method */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_city" TEXT /* Shipping city for the order */,
  "shipping_state" TEXT /* Shipping state for the order */,
  "shipping_zip_code" TEXT /* Shipping zip code for the order */,
  "shipping_country" TEXT /* Shipping country for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_method_id") REFERENCES shipping_methods ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Customer's country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., restock, sale) */,
  "quantity_changed" INTEGER /* Amount of product added or removed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the shipping method */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time associated with the shipping method */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier (e.g., UPS, FedEx, USPS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)
